rationale: Educ. Code §8.122 governs incentive funding for regional education service center efficiencies. It contains no reference to property tax exemptions, homestead values, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: The legislature may appropriate money from the foundation school fund to establish an incentive fund to encourage efficiency in the provision of services by the system of regional education service centers.
_note: No conflict found; the cited rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
